name: web2dkit
description: MCP tools and Agent Skills for building, playtesting, and debugging browser-native 2D games.

interface.longDescription: Give coding agents structured game state, deterministic gameplay scenarios, domain assertions, and repeatable quality checks for browser-native 2D games.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this Web 2D game and identify the next playable milestone.
Playtest this game with deterministic state assertions.
Reproduce this gameplay bug and save a regression scenario.
